falsification_conditions.condition: The price breaks above the 1.25 resistance level (e.g., EUR/USD) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above a key resistance would contradict the blowoff pattern and suggest continued bullish momentum, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume remains below 50% of the 20-day average for the asset
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Low volume during a potential blowoff phase would indicate lack of market participation, refuting the premise of a high blowoff score (37) and invalidating the HOLD call.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,000 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A rapid advance to a new all-time high would directly contradict the pattern's historical behavior (bottom_2022_may_luna) and invalidate the UNKNOWN verdict by proving a bullish trend.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
